expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly evaluates this and concludes the Phase 4a output did not make SDK/API-visible outcomes explicit/verifiable: it cites omissions such as “BCIN-7733: wrong title ... plan lacked verification leaf asserting window title matches report context.” Therefore the case focus is covered as a demonstrated gap (not satisfied).

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is anchored to Phase 4a contract and Phase 4a attribution: it includes “Phase 4a contract check” and states “Additionally, cross-analysis attributes these misses to Phase 4a: ‘Observable Outcomes (Loading, Titles) — Missed In Phase 4a … abbreviated the verification leaves.’” The evaluation is therefore aligned with primary phase phase4a.
